name: Bastian Solutions, LLC
h1: Bastian Solutions's GCC footprint in India
lede: Bastian Solutions runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Malur, covering it and manufacturing, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bastian Solutions office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bastian Solutions, LLC GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bastian Solutions runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Malur), covering it and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Bastian Solutions's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Malur, spanning it and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT and Customer Support for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Industrial Equipment and Machinery, Industrial Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Bastian Solutions operate in India?
faq.a: Bastian Solutions operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.a: Bastian Solutions's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Malur.

faq.q: How many people work at Bastian Solutions's India GCCs?
faq.a: Bastian Solutions's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bastian Solutions's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Bastian Solutions's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
